name: Miglior Cat Multipack Of Assorted Trays 100g X6
description: Formula designed to guarantee the key nutrients required for the well-being of your cat. Vitamin E with antioxidant action and a recipe rich in meat to help keep muscle mass toned. NUTRITIONAL CHARACTERISTICS COMPOSITION: Patè with beef and heart: meat and animal derivatives 50% (beef 5%, heart 5%), minerals. Patè with game: meat and animal derivatives 50% (game 5%), minerals. Patè with salmon: meat and animal derivatives 50%, fish and fish derivatives (salmon 5%), minerals. ANALYTICAL CONSTITUENTS: Moisture 80%, Crude protein 11%, Crude fibres 0.5%, Crude fat 4%, Crude ash 1.8%. ADDITIVES: Nutritional additives/kg: Vitamin E 23.7 mg, Zinc (Zinc sulphate monohydrate) 2.1 mg, Copper (Copper (II) sulphate pentahydrate) 2.0 mg, Manganese (Manganous sulphate monohydrate) 2.1 mg, Iodine (Potassium iodide) 0.4 mg. HOW TO USE: The product is ready to use. STORAGE INSTRUCTION: Store the product in a cool and dry place. DAILY RECOMMENDED AMOUNT Ideal weight (kg) 3 4 5 Daily amount (g) 220 270 310 *Split the recommended daily amount into at least two meals.
